tagline: Inline @-mention token + an @-triggered user picker for composers.
whenToUse: Mention has two faces. The token (FxMention) is the inline @-name chip rendered in message bodies, comments and descriptions — it links to the mentioned user's profile, or renders as static text when interactive is false. The picker (FxMentionPicker) is the combobox popover a composer opens when the user types the trigger character (@ by default): it lists matching users (avatar + name + handle) from loadUsers, capped at maxResults, and commits the active one on Enter/Tab (Esc dismisses and restores plain text). Both faces share the MentionUser shape and are reused by Chat and Comment Thread composers. The token uses a primary tint background and primary text so the mention reads as a link, never colour alone.
